MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on FEB-27-2013:
Plaintiff TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. is represented by Manuel Fuentes with Attorney Margaret DeMatteo
Defendant CAROLYN NELSON is present with Attorney John-Paul S. Deol representing the defendant though limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem Olan Lambert, litigants, and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is filed. The trial date of MAR-04-2013 is vacated.
